news.headline: Global bioconjugation market to reach USD 10.86B by 2029, up from USD 5.27B in 2024, with 15.6% CAGR.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, it is projected that the worldwide bioconjugation market will reach approximately USD 10.86 billion by 2029, a significant increase from its 2024 value of USD 5.27 billion, representing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 15.6% during the forecast period. The growth of the bioconjugation market is driven by various factors including...

news.headline: ConverzAI introduces AI Virtual Recruiters for staffing industry, hitting milestones, and attending Staffing World 2024.
news.summary: ConverzAI, a trailblazing company in AI-driven recruitment solutions, has introduced the first AI-driven Virtual Recruiters for the staffing sector. This pioneering move has been met with acclaim, as ConverzAI celebrates reaching major achievements. They have recently disclosed their participation at Staffing World 2024. Located in Seattle, the company made this announcement on October 17, 2024, sharing its accomplishments and plans for the future.

news.headline: GenNx360 Capital Partners to sell ITsavvy to Xerox Holdings Corporation in an agreement, announced on Oct 17, 2024.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, GenNx360 Capital Partners, a private equity firm based in New York, has confirmed the signing of a definitive agreement to sell ITsavvy LLC, a company offering complete IT solutions. This sale marks a significant transaction for GenNx360, indicating their continued success in the private equity sector. The specific financial details of the agreement, including the sale price and any other relevant numbers, have not been disclosed to the public as of now.

news.headline: Viral Nation partners with Trip Taylor to launch Full Tilt Network at MIPCOM 2024 with 1,000 hours of content and iconic creators.
news.summary: In Toronto, Viral Nation, a prominent social media marketing and creator agency, has partnered with renowned producer Trip Taylor to introduce Full Tilt Network at MIPCOM 2024. This new platform aims to cater to a worldwide audience and will offer more than 1,000 hours of content. It will showcase a dynamic selection of high-energy sports content and original programming from notable creators such as Nick Pro and The Dudeso.

news.headline: Altria to present 2024 third-quarter and nine-month results in a webcast. #ALTRIA
news.summary: Richmond-based Altria Group Inc will be hosting a webcast to present its financial results for the third quarter and nine months of 2024. The webcast will showcase key figures and developments, and will provide insights into the company's performance during this period.

news.headline: IMF's Managing Director Georgieva: I am worried about expanding Middle East conflict and potential for destabilized regional economies, commodity markets.
IMF's Managing Director Georgieva: Inflation rates are falling, but higher prices are here to stay, hitting the poor the hardest.
IMF's Managing Director Georgieva: The US is not in recession, despite the Federal Reserve starting rate cuts, the jobless numbers are seen staying relatively low.
Family Broadcasting Corporation starts Chicago Sports Network on WHMB TV-40 in Indianapolis for White Sox, Blackhawks, and Bulls.
news.summary: South Bend, Indiana - On October 17, 2024, Family Broadcasting Corporation (FBC) revealed the introduction of the Chicago Sports Network on WHMB TV-40 in Indianapolis, Indiana. This network will serve as the primary outlet for the Chicago White Sox, Chicago Blackhawks, and Chicago Bulls. This move comes as part of a strategic partnership agreement, offering fans in Indianapolis access to coverage of these major sports teams.

news.headline: Island Pacific Seafood Market and GCash partner to empower Filipino community financially. Oct. 17, 2024.
news.summary: In City of Industry, California, on October 17, 2024, Island Pacific Seafood Market, a well-known establishment in the Filipino-American community, has announced a significant partnership with GCash, the top financial technology app in the Philippines. This innovative collaboration is set to connect...

news.headline: Health Recovery Solutions named one of 2024's top remote patient monitoring companies by AVIA Marketplace.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, Health Recovery Solutions from Hoboken, NJ, was named a top company in Remote Patient Monitoring (RPM) for 2024. This recognition followed thorough research and outreach by AVIA Marketplace, a prominent digital health marketplace.

news.headline: Unity 6 launched globally, delivering enhanced performance and stability for game development (NYSE: U).
news.summary: In San Francisco, Unity, a prominent platform for developing games and interactive experiences, unveiled Unity 6 globally. This new version, renowned for its stability and performance, promises enhanced game development capabilities across the world. Unity 6 was developed in collaboration with developers worldwide and offers innovative features. With this update, creating high-quality games efficiently and promptly is now more achievable than ever before.

news.headline: Upfront partners with athenahealth to improve patient engagement and operational efficiency; aims to enhance healthcare experiences.
news.summary: A technology company, Upfront Healthcare, based in Chicago, has recently partnered with athenahealth Inc. through the latter's Marketplace program. This partnership aims to utilize patient data effectively to improve outreach processes and enhance operational efficiency within the healthcare industry. Through this integration, Upfront's patient engagement platform will help facilitate smoother communication and connectivity across the care continuum. Ultimately, this collaboration seeks to deliver more intelligent and cohesive healthcare experiences, resulting in better patient outcomes.

news.headline: JPalmer Collective raises $72M to grow and fund new clients, focusing on high-growth companies and women-led businesses.
news.summary: JPalmer Collective (JPC), an asset-based lending (ABL) company based in New York, is securing capital to facilitate its growth strategy. The firm specializes in funding high-growth companies, particularly those led by women and involved in the natural products sector. By making financing more accessible, JPC aims to support these businesses in their expansion efforts. This initiative comes as of October 17, 2024.

news.headline: eClinicalWorks AI saves York Primary Care over an hour daily on handling faxes, enhancing clinical focus.
news.summary: In Westborough, Massachusetts, eClinicalWorks®, the leading ambulatory cloud EHR provider, shared the success story of York Primary Care using their AI-driven EHR technology, particularly Image AI. This internal medicine practice has managed to save more than an hour daily in organizing incoming faxes to match the right patient records by using Image AI. This efficiency enhancement translates into substantial time savings, allowing the practice to prioritize clinical duties and enhance patient care. It's a significant advancement for York Primary Care.

news.headline: Bosland Growth launching mine land reforestation project in PA's Lake Pleasant area to improve property.
news.summary: Beginning in mid-October 2024, Bosland Growth is set to initiate site preparation for a reforestation project on mine land at the Lake Pleasant Conservation Area in Waterford, Pennsylvania. The project aims to enhance the property by planting a new forest, which is expected to bring about substantial improvements to the land.

news.headline: 88% of retailers are hiring for holiday shopping surge, according to UKG survey.
news.summary: In Lowell, Mass, and Weston, Fla, a recent study by UKG reveals that 88% of retailers are currently in the process of hiring to prepare for the anticipated seasonal increase. This marks the fifth consecutive year for this survey on retail hiring trends.

news.headline: Nikon Small World marks 50th year with image of brain tumor cells, pushing knowledge of neurodegenerative diseases.
news.summary: Nikon Small World commemorates its 50th anniversary by recognizing a captivating image showcasing the intricate structures of brain tumor cells, contributing to the progress in comprehending neurodegenerative illnesses. The event took place in Melville, New York on October 17, 2024. Nikon Instruments Inc. revealed the victorious entry for the 50th consecutive year, marking a significant milestone in the competition's history.

news.headline: Q2 introduces Symphonix lending platform for non-bank lenders worldwide, includes loan origination and servicing.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Q2 Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: QTWO), a prominent provider of digital transformation solutions for financial services, unveiled Symphonix, the upgraded cloud-based digital lending solution. Symphonix is tailored to aid non-bank lenders in constructing and expanding lucrative portfolios. This innovative platform offers cloud-based services including loan origination, loan servicing, collections, and investor management applications worldwide.

news.headline: Revolve names K-pop artist Jeon Somi as global brand ambassador. Collaboration announced in Los Angeles on Oct. 17, 2024.
news.summary: A new collaboration has been unveiled in Los Angeles on October 17, 2024, between REVOLVE, a fashion retailer popular among Millennials and Generation Z, and JEON SOMI, a talented K-Pop artist of South Korean-Canadian descent. This partnership marks a significant milestone as SOMI becomes the first global ambassador for REVOLVE.

news.headline: Crypto.com Arena finishes Phase Three of multi-million dollar renovation for 25th anniversary, part of a nine-figure project.
news.summary: The renovation project at Crypto.com Arena in Los Angeles has reached its Phase Three completion. This project, amounting to a nine-figure multi-million dollar investment, is set to be fully finished for the arena's 25th anniversary in October.

news.headline: Founder of Sanyou Bio unveils world's largest super-trillion molecule library after 9 years; interview on breakthrough drug innovation.
news.summary: Shanghai, on October 17, 2024 - Sanyou Bio, established nine years ago, is set to reveal the world's largest super-trillion molecule library, according to Lang Guojun. He expressed his confidence in this milestone during an interview with Tongxieyi. This announcement marks a significant achievement for the company and showcases its dedication to innovation. The event comes at a strategic time for Sanyou Bio, demonstrating its commitment to advancing research and development in the field. Lang Guojun's assurance and enthusiasm highlight the promising future prospects as the company continues to make advancements in the industry.

news.headline: FundingShield Q3 2024 report: 46.43% of $82bn transactions at risk of wire fraud, with 2.23 issues per loan on average.
news.summary: In Newport Beach, California, in the third quarter of 2024, a total of 46.43% of transactions within an $82 billion loan portfolio (consisting of residential, commercial, and business purpose loans) were found to have issues that could potentially lead to wire and title fraud risks. On average, problematic loans exhibited 2.23 issues per loan, highlighting a notable deficiency in the implementation of proper controls by closing agents and lenders to detect and address such issues. Furthermore, during Q3 2024, there were record-high risk levels related to CPL errors, accounting for 45.1% of transactions, specifically concerning critical data points.

news.headline: Colliers Project Leaders wins $250 million contract for World Trade Center project in Yerevan, Armenia.
news.summary: In Yerevan, Armenia, on October 17, 2024, a renowned project management company, Colliers Project Leaders in the Middle East, has secured a significant contract to provide comprehensive project management services for the construction of Armenia's upcoming World Trade Center. The project is estimated to be worth approximately $250 million.

news.headline: IMF's Managing Director Georgieva: The big global wave of inflation is in retreat, and the world is moving back in the direction of price stability.
Quantum Computing, Inc. receives 5th project from NASA to support LiDAR missions.
news.summary: In Hoboken, New Jersey on October 17, 2024, Quantum Computing Inc. (QCi) revealed that they have secured their fifth project from the National Aeronautics and Space Administration (NASA). Known as QCi and listed on the Nasdaq as QUBT, the company specializes in integrated photonics and quantum optics technology.

news.headline: IMF's Managing Director Georgieva: Forecasts show global economy facing difficult future with lackluster medium-term growth and high debt.
IMF's Managing Director Georgieva: High public debt and high interest rates and low growth will limit countries' ability to invest in domestic economies.
Endeavor set to release Q3 2024 results on 11/7/24.
IMF's Managing Director Georgieva: Trade restrictions and rising protectionism will prevent trade from fueling global growth.
Morse Micro launches Wi-Fi forum & GitHub Repositories to accelerate development globally. Leading in Wi-Fi HaLow.
news.summary: Sydney and Irvine, California - On October 17, 2024, Morse Micro, a top provider of Wi-Fi HaLow solutions, revealed the introduction of numerous open-source GitHub repositories. This move aims to support engineers and developers globally in accelerating Wi-Fi development.

news.headline: Survey shows 83% of Americans with credit card debt struggled financially in 2024 due to inflation, with average household budget deficit of $300/month; voices real-life economic challenges.
news.summary: A survey conducted by The Harris Poll for MMI reveals that 83% of Americans with credit card debt struggled to make ends meet due to inflation. 73% point to inflation as a significant pressure on their budget, impacting essentials like groceries and utilities. New clients seeking financial counseling have an average monthly household deficit of nearly $300, doubling in the past two years. Examples include a 71-year-old man unable to afford beef and a 46-year-old woman delaying a vacation and new car purchase. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Toyota Racing will rebrand to Toyota Gazoo Racing North America in 2025. Announcement made by Toyota Motor North America on Oct 17, 2024.
news.summary: Toyota Racing will be rebranded as Toyota Gazoo Racing North America starting in 2025. The announcement was made by Toyota Motor North America (TMNA) on October 17, 2024, in Plano, Texas. The division's name change will take effect before the beginning of the racing season.

news.headline: 'Moonray' game expanding to PS5 in 2025 without crypto features, growing beyond PC platform.
news.summary: In 2025, Moonray is set to broaden its reach by transitioning from PC to PlayStation 5. However, the PlayStation 5 version of the game, which operates on Ethereum technology, will not initially include any cryptocurrency functionalities.

news.headline: Alkami wins "Best Banking App" award for top mobile platform and UX. PLANO, Texas Oct. 17, 2024. Nasdaq: ALKT.
news.summary: Alkami, based in Plano, Texas, was recognized with The Big Bank Theory Award for its exceptional mobile banking platform and top-notch user experience, driven by data. The award was received on October 17, 2024. Alkami Technology, Inc. (Nasdaq: ALKT), a prominent provider of cloud-based digital banking solutions, was honored for its innovative approach in this field.

news.headline: Camposol Holding PLC will announce Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 13, 2024, at 10:00 am Peru Time.
news.summary: On Wednesday, November 13, 2024, at 10:00 am Peru Time, Camposol Holding PLC is set to disclose its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024.

news.headline: Ublives debuts SoleFlux Relax Compression Boots to ease leg pain for parents, offering practical relief and comfort.
news.summary: In a recent press release on October 17, 2024, Ublives unveiled their newest product, the SoleFlux Relax Compression Boots. This cutting-edge innovation aims to address leg pain and discomfort efficiently. The boots are positioned as a thoughtful present for parents and offer a practical remedy for various leg-related issues.

news.headline: Evology Charging and CSL Group partner to enhance EV charging with rSIM technology, improving reliability and efficiency.
news.summary: In London on October 17, 2024, Evology Charging and CSL Group announced their partnership extension with the introduction of rSIM technology. This innovation aims to transform electric vehicle (EV) charging processes, establishing unprecedented levels of reliability and efficiency in the industry. Evology Charging, known for their trailblazing initiatives in the EV sector, along with CSL Group, is setting new benchmarks for operational excellence.

news.headline: Wayne-Sanderson Farms CEO Clint Rivers will retire on March 31, 2025, continuing as Executive Chairman.
news.summary: In Oakwood, Georgia, on October 17, 2024, Wayne-Sanderson Farms revealed that Clint Rivers is set to retire as President and CEO when the company's fiscal year concludes on March 31, 2025. Rivers will transition into the role of Executive Chairman following his retirement.

news.headline: The Pop Insider unveils 6th annual gift guide at NY Comic Con, featuring top pop-culture picks for every fan. #Deadpool #Wolverine #Pokémon #Fallout products top list. Get copy of guide at event.
news.summary: Topping The Pop Insider's Pop 20 list are products featuring Deadpool & Wolverine, Pokémon, and Fallout. The 2024 Holiday Gift Guide will be available at New York Comic Con from Oct. 17-21 at the Javits Center. The guide showcases the most popular items for the season. Don't miss out on these must-have items if you're attending the event.

news.headline: Patriot Growth Insurance partners with Dreher Insurance to enhance expertise and expand in the Southeast.
news.summary: Fort Washington, Pennsylvania - On October 17, 2024, Patriot Growth Insurance Services LLC, a leading insurance services company in the U.S., has revealed a significant development. They have formed a strategic alliance with Dreher Insurance, a well-known insurance agency. Patriot Growth Insurance Services LLC is notably recognized for its rapid expansion and impressive stature within the insurance industry. This collaboration marks a notable milestone for both entities as they look forward to leveraging their combined expertise.

news.headline: Gen Z turning to side hustles for career development amid layoffs. Quicken survey reveals growing trend.
news.summary: As layoffs continue to impact workers across various industries, many are actively seeking ways to enhance their skills and safeguard their careers by engaging in side hustles. Quicken, known for producing the top-selling personal finance software in the US, has recently disclosed further insights on this trend. This proactive approach comes as a response to the current challenges faced by employees, highlighting the urgency for upskilling and preparing for the future job market. The initiative aims to empower individuals to take control of their professional development amidst uncertain economic conditions.

news.headline: Dow jumps over 100 points, Alcoa beats estimates. Dow at 43,220.63, NASDAQ at 18,451.67, S&P 500 at 5,862.20. Alcoa's Q3 sales $2.904B, EPS 57 cents. STAF up 242%, NIXX up 162%. Tech stocks up, real estate down.
news.summary: This morning, U.S. stocks saw an uptick, with the Dow Jones index climbing over 100 points to 43,220.63, a 0.33% increase. The NASDAQ also rose by 0.46% to 18,451.67, while the S&P 500 gained 0.34% to reach 5,862.20. Information technology shares surged by 1%, but real estate shares experienced a 0.5% dip. Alcoa Corporation (NYSE: AA) exceeded expectations in their third-quarter earnings report, with sales hitting $2.904 billion (missing the estimated $2.967 billion) and an adjusted EPS of 57 cents (above the expected 28 cents). Among the top gainers were Staffing 360 Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ: STAF) with a 242% increase to $4.68, and Nixxy, Inc. (NASDAQ: NIXX) which surged 162% to $6.18 after releasing updates.

news.headline: Camposol Holding PLC to announce Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 13 at 10:00 am Peru Time. Conference call led by Interim CEO and IRO. Register to participate in Q&A session using link provided.
news.summary: Camposol Holding PLC is scheduled to reveal its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 on Wednesday, November 13, 2024, at 10:00 am Peru Time. The interim CEO, Ricardo Naranjo Fernandez, and the IRO, Jossue Yesquen Lihim, will lead a conference call presentation and Q&A session. To participate in the conference call, individuals can register using the link: https://register.vevent.com/register/BIe12d042ca95f4afeae4cdd134cdf543a. It is recommended that participants log in and adjust settings before the call commences. For access to the accompanying webcast presentation, further details are available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Procter & Gamble (PG) to report $1.90 EPS on 2024-10-18. Past beats led to -1% price change. Shares at $172.38, +16.58% in 52 weeks. Neutral rating, target $172.64.
news.summary: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) is scheduled to release its quarterly earnings report on 2024-10-18, with analysts projecting an EPS of $1.90. In the previous quarter, the company exceeded EPS estimates by $0.03, causing a 0.58% drop in the share price. Procter & Gamble's stock was trading at $172.38 on October 16, with a 16.58% increase over the last 52 weeks. Analysts have given the company a consensus rating of Neutral, with an average one-year price target of $172.64. Market sentiments and future projections will heavily influence stock prices post-earnings release.

news.headline: IMF's Georgieva: US and Euro area labor markets are cooling in an orderly manner.
Saputo Inc. to unveil fiscal 2025 Q2 results on Nov 7, 2024, with a conference call on Nov 8.CEO and CFO to speak.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, it was announced that Saputo is set to unveil its financial performance for the second quarter of fiscal 2025 on November 7, 2024. The press release detailing the results will be shared once the markets close, with a conference call planned for November 8, 2024, at 8:30 a.m. (Eastern Time). Leading the discussion on the Company’s outcomes will be Mr. Carl Colizza, the President and CEO, and Mr. Maxime Therrien, the CFO and Secretary.

news.headline: Parrish & Heimbecker partners with ISN to manage contractors across 40+ locations incl. grain terminals in Ontario.
news.summary: In Dallas, ISN, a prominent provider of contractor and supplier information management services, revealed that Parrish & Heimbecker, Limited (P&H), a key player in Canada’s agri-food sector, has chosen ISNetworld as its primary platform for contractor information management. This move aims to streamline contractor safety, compliance, and communication processes for P&H, which operates over 40 locations, including grain terminals in Ontario. The partnership is crucial for ensuring safe and efficient operations at their various facilities.
